name: Now You Don't
flavor: The curtain drops for exactly one second. When it rises, you're not where the audience is looking anymore.
description: You vanish behind a snap of silk and misdirection, becoming invisible until the start of your next turn or until you make an attack roll, force a saving throw, or force an ability check, whichever comes first. As part of casting this, you may also move up to 10 feet without provoking opportunity attacks - the last thing anyone saw of you was already the wrong direction.
sheetSummary: Bonus action, self, cooldown 3. Invisible until start of your next turn or until you attack/force a save or check; may move 10 ft without provoking opportunity attacks as part of the trick.
